languages.text: "Этот образец мы с коллегой обнаружили в состоянии естественного криостазиса. Его способность функционировать вопреки повреждениям захватила мое воображение. Мыслимо ли было отказаться от его изучения? С тех пор он и заключен в контейнере, предназначенном для... контролируемого препарирования".

"My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."
languages.original_text: "Этот образец мы с коллегой обнаружили в состоянии естественного криостазиса. Его способность функционировать вопреки повреждениям захватила мое воображение. Мыслимо ли было отказаться от его изучения? С тех пор он и заключен в контейнере, предназначенном для... контролируемого препарирования".

traits.locale_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

"My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

"My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

languages.text: “我与同僚发现此实验对象时，它正处于自然低温休眠状态。它在严重受损状态下仍能运作的能力，激发了我的研究兴趣。这样的研究机会，我自然不可能放过。自那之后，它便被收容于一个……用于受控解剖的容器之中。”
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

traits.locale_text: “我与同僚发现此实验对象时，它正处于自然低温休眠状态。它在严重受损状态下仍能运作的能力，激发了我的研究兴趣。这样的研究机会，我自然不可能放过。自那之后，它便被收容于一个……用于受控解剖的容器之中。”

languages.text: «Mi compañero y yo descubrimos a este espécimen en un estado de criosuspensión natural. Me fascinó su capacidad para seguir en funcionamiento tras sufrir tantos daños; debía investigarlo sí o sí. Lo aislamos en un contenedor creado para... diseccionarlo de forma supervisada».
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

traits.locale_text: «Mi compañero y yo descubrimos a este espécimen en un estado de criosuspensión natural. Me fascinó su capacidad para seguir en funcionamiento tras sufrir tantos daños; debía investigarlo sí o sí. Lo aislamos en un contenedor creado para... diseccionarlo de forma supervisada».

languages.text: « Mon collègue et moi-même avons découvert ce spécimen dans un état de stase cryogénique naturelle. Sa capacité à fonctionner malgré ses défaillances m'a tout de suite fasciné. Il était hors de question que je laisse passer la chance de l'étudier. Depuis cette époque, il est confiné dans un conteneur destiné aux... dissections supervisées. »
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

traits.locale_text: « Mon collègue et moi-même avons découvert ce spécimen dans un état de stase cryogénique naturelle. Sa capacité à fonctionner malgré ses défaillances m'a tout de suite fasciné. Il était hors de question que je laisse passer la chance de l'étudier. Depuis cette époque, il est confiné dans un conteneur destiné aux... dissections supervisées. »

languages.text: "Meslektaşım ve ben, bu numuneyi doğal bir kriyostaz hâlindeyken keşfettik. Hasarlı durumuna rağmen işlev görme yeteneği, hayal gücümü ele geçirdi. Onu inceleme şansını reddetmek düşünülemezdi. O zamandan beri... Gözetimli operasyonlar için tasarlanmış bir konteynerde tutuluyor."
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşım ve ben, bu numuneyi doğal bir kriyostaz hâlindeyken keşfettik. Hasarlı durumuna rağmen işlev görme yeteneği, hayal gücümü ele geçirdi. Onu inceleme şansını reddetmek düşünülemezdi. O zamandan beri... Gözetimli operasyonlar için tasarlanmış bir konteynerde tutuluyor."

languages.text: "Meine Kollegen und ich entdeckten diese Spezies im Zustand einer natürlichen Kryostase. Ihre Fähigkeit, trotz ihres schadhaften Zustandes zu funktionieren, faszinierte mich. Es war nahezu undenkbar, sie nicht zu studieren. Seitdem befindet sie sich in einem Behälter für ... überwachte Dissektionen."
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Kollegen und ich entdeckten diese Spezies im Zustand einer natürlichen Kryostase. Ihre Fähigkeit, trotz ihres schadhaften Zustandes zu funktionieren, faszinierte mich. Es war nahezu undenkbar, sie nicht zu studieren. Seitdem befindet sie sich in einem Behälter für ... überwachte Dissektionen."

languages.text: 「同僚と私は、この標本を自然の凍結状態で見つけました。損傷した状態でも機能する能力に、私は魅了されました。研究する機会を断ることは、ほとんど考えられませんでした。それから、この標本は、監督された解剖のために用意された容器に収められました」
languages.original_text: "My colleague and I discovered this specimen in a state of natural cryostasis. Its ability to function in spite of its damaged state captured my imagination. Refusing the chance to study it was almost unthinkable. Since then it has been confined in a container intended for... supervised dissections."

traits.locale_text: 「同僚と私は、この標本を自然の凍結状態で見つけました。損傷した状態でも機能する能力に、私は魅了されました。研究する機会を断ることは、ほとんど考えられませんでした。それから、この標本は、監督された解剖のために用意された容器に収められました。」
